title: Currency Code Displayed Alongside All Amounts (FR-021)

steps.given: A EUR account exists with transactions
steps.when: The user views the account in the account list
steps.then: The balance is shown as 'X EUR' or '€X' (not as '$X' or a plain number)

steps.given: The user is in the Fast Entry sheet with a USD account selected
steps.when: The amount input field is rendered
steps.then: The currency indicator next to the input field shows 'USD' (not '$' or any other hardcoded symbol)

steps.given: A transaction row in the timeline belongs to a SEK account
steps.then: The transaction amount is shown with 'SEK' label
